prestazioni: 20B-REW Triple-Rotor 2.0L (654cc x 3) forced induction upgrade with Garrett GTX4202R turbochargers (dual setup, 24psi boost, 600+ hp), custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Racing Beat, and HKS F-CON V Pro standalone ECU with 20B-specific fuel and ignition maps
Full titanium 4-2-1 exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R with 3.5-inch piping, custom 20B-specific mufflers, and secondary O2 sensor eliminators for standalone ECU compatibility

KW Variant 3 coilovers with 20B-specific valving, custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear), and adjustable top mounts by Cusco for chassis reinforcement, paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and poly bushings
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion kit with custom 20B-specific fender flares, carbon fiber hood by Seibon, and rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (JDM-spec, non-USDM version)
Custom 20B-REW engine bay dress-up with carbon fiber valve covers by Autoexe, titanium oil cap by HKS, and custom billet aluminum coolant reservoir by Jun Auto

Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +25 front and 18x12 +30 rear wheels with custom offsets, wrapped in Toyo R888R 275/35/18 and 315/30/18 tires, paired with DBA 5000 Series rotors and Endless CC-RG6 brake pads
